summary: A poorly recorded show marred by a whistle and uneven performances, with Me & My Uncle > Big River and Candyman providing the only real highlights.
review: The taper notes that a rogue whistle near the sweet spot and stray mic stands seriously compromised the sound, ruining Jack Straw and an otherwise strong Sugaree. While Me & My Uncle → Big River and Candyman are praised, Bob Weir’s vocal delivery is called soulless and many moments left listeners frustrated. Overall the recording quality is weak and the performance uneven.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review, which rates the show low (2 stars) and cites major recording problems plus several weak performances; a few songs are praised but not enough to raise the overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: A whistle in the sweet spot and mic‑stand interference caused significant audio disruption, frustrating tapers and ruining parts of the set.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Inconsistent; occasional strong moments are outweighed by disruptive audio issues and lackluster vocal delivery.

band_member_comments.Bob: Bob Weir’s singing is described as soulless, likened to a Pat Boone imitation that ruined several songs.
